positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a celestial journey. Central composition featuring a vibrant, glowing nebula forming a stylized, symmetrical pathway leading towards a lone, detailed mountain silhouette under a crescent moon. The overall aesthetic should be neo-vintage botanical meets cosmic wonder, using deep indigos, electric teals, soft violets, and luminous gold accents. Emphasis on clean linework, high contrast between the celestial glow and the solid foreground silhouettes. Suitable for screen printing on dark apparel, ensuring no complex gradients or fine details are lost in fabric texture. Whimsical and highly symbolic.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermarks, lowres, jpeg artifacts, grainy, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, oversaturated, gradient, photo, realistic
